comment_text.sn37.27:1.5: “Lives having mastered” is abhibhuyya vattati (cf. AN 7.63:7.3); Rig Veda 10.159.5 has abhibhūvarī in the same sense.

root_text.sn37.27:1.4: imāni kho, bhikkhave, pañca mātugāmassa balāni.
root_text.sn37.27:1.5: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi balehi samannāgato mātugāmo sāmikaṁ abhibhuyya vattatī”ti.

translation_text.sn37.27:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five powers of a lady.
translation_text.sn37.27:1.3: Attractiveness, wealth, relatives, children, and ethical behavior.
translation_text.sn37.27:1.4: These are the five powers of a lady.
translation_text.sn37.27:1.5: A lady with these five powers lives having mastered her husband.”
